title: Notes from building small systems
content:
# Notes from building small systems

This space is for short notes about embedded systems, IoT, algorithms and debugging.

I use small projects to understand how software behaves when timing, memory and communication details matter.

Topics I want to write about:

- ESP32 experiments
- MQTT-based IoT communication
- Verilog simulation notes
- Benchmarking algorithms
- Debugging small systems
